items.title: Joe Rogan Experience #2334 - Kash Patel
items.author: PowerfulJRE
items.content:
<article>Kash Patel is the Director of the FBI, appointed in February 2025. A former federal public defender, national security prosecutor, and senior official in both the Department of Justice and the Trump administration, he has held roles across the Intelligence Community, Department of Defense, and National Security Council.

https://www.fbi.gov</article>
